title: Chronic Kidney Disease Management in Primary Care
summary: This document provides guidelines for managing Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) in adults, outlining CKD definitions, screening methods including UACR and eGFR, risk assessment, categorization, monitoring frequency, referral criteria, and a three-step management solution. It also details specific pharmacological interventions like RAAS blockade and Finerenone, along with monitoring blood results and offers a CKD heat map and quick reference guides. The focus is on early detection, management strategies, and patient resources.
